page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, delivering 32 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core. A key characteristic of this instance is its bundled local storage, consisting of 7679 GB of SSD capacity. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, including stress-ng single-core CPU performance, Geekbench single-core score, and text processing, fall into the weak category, with single-threaded gzip compression performing poorly. However, the server leverages its 32 dedicated cores to achieve average performance in multi-core benchmarks, such as stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression. Memory bandwidth for both small and large blocks is average, though the Passmark memory score is weak.

Given the combination of 256.0 GB of RAM and 7679 GB of local SSD storage, this server is designed for storage-heavy and database workloads. It achieves average performance in database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving. For computational tasks, it supports average performance in software compilation, ray tracing, and image processing, as well as LLM inference for small and medium models. Qualitatively, the server offers high resource density for storage and memory, making it cost-efficient for workloads that require large local scratch space or database caching, though it is less suited for single-thread-bound compute tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs, 256.0 GB of RAM, and a substantial 7679 GB of local SSD storage. Operating on a KVM hypervisor with a 10 Gbps network baseline, this instance exhibits a performance profile characterized by weak single-core capabilities but average multi-core and memory bandwidth performance. Multi-threaded tasks, such as software compilation, ray tracing, and bzip3 decompression, perform in the middle tier. The server is qualitatively cost-efficient for storage-intensive and database workloads that can leverage its massive local SSD capacity and 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It is well-suited for database operations, Redis caching, static web serving, and medium-scale LLM inference, though it presents a tradeoff with lower single-threaded efficiency.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 7679 GB local SSD, offering average multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.8xlarge features 32 dedicated vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 7679 GB local SSD storage for database and storage-intensive workloads.
tagline: A storage-dense virtual server combining 256 GB of memory with 7.6 TB of local SSD for database and multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs with 256 GB RAM
7679 GB of high-capacity local SSD storage
Average multi-core performance across compilation and decompression benchmarks
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on KVM hypervisor
Optimized for database operations, Redis, and static web serving
Tradeoff of weaker single-core and single-threaded performance
